title: Add manifest type conversion to buildah push
body:
Add manifest type conversion to buildah push with dir transport

User can select from 3 manifest types: oci, v2s1, or v2s2
e.g buildah push --format v2s2 alpine dir:my-directory

Did not add the `compress` flag because buildah push compresses by default and has the `disable-compression` flag to push the uncompressed form of the image

Signed-off-by: Urvashi Mohnani <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/377 needs to be merged upstream and vendored in first.
